description: Flags a direct len(...) call on an Optional value introduced by the diff.
pr_diff:
diff --git a/service.py b/service.py
--- a/service.py
+++ b/service.py
@@ -10,3 +10,4 @@
 def summary(payload):
-    return 0
+    count = len(payload.get("items"))
+    return count

findings.message: Guard payload.get("items") before calling len(...) because it may be None.
findings.evidence: The new code calls len(payload.get("items")) directly, and dict.get returns None when the key is absent.

description: Flags SQL built from user-controlled input in a prepared-statement sized diff.

findings.message: Do not concatenate email into SQL; use a parameterized query to avoid injection.
findings.evidence: The new SQL string includes the email variable inside the statement text.
findings.anchor: String sql = "select * from users where email = '" + email + "'";
